task_name: Define project goals and success metrics
notes: What does done look like? How will we know it worked?
rationale: Establishes the north star for all subsequent decisions

notes: Who needs to approve? Who is affected?
rationale: Prevents missing stakeholder surprises late in project

notes: Budget, timeline, tech stack, must-haves vs. nice-to-haves
rationale: Scope creep usually starts here if requirements are vague

notes: Flag unknowns before planning begins
rationale: Risks identified early are 10x cheaper to address

task_name: Create task breakdown and dependency map
notes: Break all work into concrete tasks with clear owners
rationale: Skipping this step is the most common reason projects run late

notes: Use XS/S/M/L/XL sizing. Add 20% buffer for unknowns.
rationale: Honest estimation prevents downstream schedule failures

task_name: Assign task owners and confirm availability
notes: Confirm people have capacity before assigning
rationale: Assuming availability is a top cause of missed deadlines

notes: Get approval before execution begins
rationale: Prevents rework from stakeholder surprises during build

task_name: Set up working environment and tooling
notes: Repo, CI/CD, access, credentials, environments
rationale: Environment setup delays compound quickly

notes: Build the most important features first
rationale: Delivers value early and surfaces hard problems sooner

notes: Checkpoint to catch direction issues early
rationale: Prevents 'big reveal' failures at end of project

notes: APIs, third-party services, internal systems
rationale: External dependencies are the most common source of delays

notes: Build remaining features after P1 is solid
Cover all key user flows and edge cases
rationale: Untested code ships bugs that cost 10x more to fix in production

notes: Real users test real workflows
rationale: Stakeholder sign-off is typically required before launch

notes: Fix Critical and High bugs before launch
rationale: Low bugs can follow in next release

notes: One final confirmation before going live
rationale: Non-negotiable gate — prevents premature launches

task_name: Prepare and execute launch or deployment
notes: Have rollback plan ready
rationale: Rollback readiness is the single most important launch safety net

task_name: Communicate launch to affected teams and users
notes: Who needs to know? When? What action do they need to take?
rationale: Poor comms causes confusion and duplicate support tickets

notes: Did we hit the goals set in DIS-001?
rationale: Closes the feedback loop — learning for the next project

notes: Survey, interviews, usage data
rationale: Qualitative signal catches problems metrics miss

task_name: Document lessons learned and archive artifacts
notes: What would we do differently?
rationale: Institutional knowledge captured here prevents repeated mistakes
